name: robot
short_description: Unified Python interface for CLI-based coding agents with support for Claude, Codex, Gemini, and others.
long_description: Robot is a Python framework that provides a consistent API for invoking multiple AI coding assistants (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini, Mistral Vibe, Aider) in headless mode. It supports YAML-based prompt configuration, session resumption with cached context, superagent mode for spawning parallel subagents to handle complex multi-step tasks, and includes a web interface for interactive chat. Robot abstracts away differences between agent CLIs and provides streaming output, system prompts, tools, and model selection across different providers.

modules.description: Main package exports for Robot - includes Robot registry, BaseAgent, SuperAgent, and AgentResponse classes.
Agent factory and registry that discovers, registers, and instantiates coding agents dynamically.
Abstract BaseAgent class defining the interface for all agent implementations with subprocess execution, rate limiting, and retry logic.
Command-line interface providing direct access to run prompts, tasks, check agents, and interactive mode with superagent support.
Interactive TUI mode for Robot using prompt_toolkit with live model/agent switching and multi-line input support.
SuperAgent class that wraps base agents to spawn and orchestrate up to 5 parallel subagents for complex multi-step tasks.
FastAPI web server providing REST API, JWT authentication, conversation management, and real-time chat interface for Robot.
Configuration management loading settings from environment variables and dotenv files.
AgentResponse class representing structured output from agents with parsed content, metadata, and tool usage tracking.
Status event tracking system for streaming output and real-time feedback on agent execution progress.
YAML-based prompt configuration loader supporting templating and per-agent model specifications.
Claude Code CLI agent implementation with full tool support, JSON parsing, and system prompt configuration.
OpenAI Codex agent implementation providing access to GPT models via OpenAI API.
Google Gemini agent implementation with streaming support and system prompt injection via temp files.
OpenRouter agent providing unified access to any model through OpenRouter API with convenient model aliases.
